raw.message: Your favorite robot PvP just got hotter!

hook.summary: Intense mech combat showing a player-controlled robot firing missiles and destroying enemies in a city.
hook.visual_action: A blue and orange mech fires dual missile launchers at enemy mechs, causing large explosions.

scene_flow: Player mech engages enemy mechs in a city environment with heavy missile fire.
Enemy mechs are destroyed in sequence, showcasing the power of the player's unit.
A 'TRIPLE KILL' notification appears on screen with a corresponding voiceover announcement.
The screen cuts to a dark, textured background with a 'START NOW!' call to action.
audience_proxy: Action-oriented male gamers interested in mech warfare and competitive shooters.
